name: Play Dough (Gold Medal Flour Recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a 1 1/2 quart saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat for 4 to 5 minutes, stirring vigorously until dough forms a ball.
3. Remove from pan and let stand for 5 minutes.
4. Knead for 30 to 45 seconds or until smooth.
5. Allow the dough to cool completely before using.
6. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
